topic: exclusive distributor and foreign market access
trigger_keywords: productores de vino prefieren trabajar con un distribuidor exclusivo
conocimiento del mercado local, red de clientes y gestión logística y legal

steps.label: cause
steps.text: A producer appoints an exclusive distributor with established capabilities in a foreign market.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: The distributor supplies local market knowledge, customer relationships, logistics, and legal or customs administration that the producer may not possess directly.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: The producer can enter and serve that market with less duplicated commercial infrastructure, although exclusivity does not guarantee sales or suitable representation.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: A capable distributor can improve foreign market access through local knowledge, customer networks, logistics, and regulatory administration.

_meta.source_note: Inferred formative model - not official WSET assessment or mark-scheme content
